commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a JSON5 `openclaw.json` config section to `docs/nodes/index.md` covering `gateway.nodes` and `tools.exec` node settings plus a per-agent exec-node override.

PR surface: Docs +48. Total +48 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current `docs/nodes/index.md` shows node exec config commands and command-policy prose, but no direct `openclaw.json`/JSON5 example on the reported `/nodes` page.
